name: Juniper Industrial Holdings, Inc.
description: Juniper Industrial Holdings, Inc. was a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses in the industrial sector. Incorporated in 2019 and based in Chatham, New Jersey, the company completed its business combination with Janus International Group, LLC in June 2021, after which it ceased to operate as an independent SPAC.
